title: Google Tests an AI tool that Turns PDFs Into Interactive Textbooks | AI in Education, Industry, and Government
text:
Google Tests an AI tool that Turns PDFs Into Interactive Textbooks
October 8, 2025
IBL News | New York
Google
introduced
its latest experiment this month: an AI tool that turns PDFs and textbooks into interactive lessons (mindmaps, immersive texts, slides, adaptive quizzes, and audio lessons).
The tool, named
“Learn Your Way”
, adapts the source materials to the user’s level and interests.
According to Google,
“Learn Your Way”
has been developed in collaboration with pedagogy experts and is backed by research to drive quality and efficacy for every learner.
“It demonstrates what’s possible when we combine Google’s cutting-edge AI research with effective learning science,”
said the software giant.
Moreover, the
actual research
explains Google’s guiding initiative of building an AI-augmented textbook.
Discover more
